content.full_text:
California
Fair Political
Practices Commission
August 31,
1992
Diane D.
Adams
1711 North Grismer,
Suite 30
Burbank,
CA
91504
Re:
Your Request for Assistance
Our File No.
G—92—444
Dear Ms.
Adams:
This letter is in response to your letter to Mark T.
Morodomi
regarding the duties of the City of Burbank under the provisions
of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).
1
The Commission provides advice to any person whose duties
under the Act are in question or to that person’s authorized
representative.
(Section 83114(b).)
The Commission does not
provide advice to third parties concerning another person’s duties
under the Act.
(Regulation 18329(b) (8).)
It does not appear that you have been authorized by the City
of Burbank to seek our advice.
Accordingly,
we decline to provide
advice on the issues you raised in your letter.
For your information,
we are enclosing a copy of the
Political Reform Act, Regulation 18530,
and the Bruckxnan Advice
Letter,
No.
A-89-518.
Government Code Sections 81000-91015.
All statutory references
e to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated.-
Commission
regulations appear at
2 California Code of Regulations Section
18000,
g.
All references to regulations are to Title 2,
Division
6 of the California Code of Regulations.
428 J Street, Suite 800 •
P.O. Box 807 •
Sacramento, CA
95812 •
(916) 322-5660


Our File No.
G-92-444
Page
2
We trust this letter adequately responds to your inquiry.
Should you have any further questions regarding this matter,
do
not hesitate to call me at
(916)
322_5901.2
Sincerely,
Scott Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel
By:
Blanca 14.
Breeze
Counsel,
Legal Division
SH:BMB: aa
Enclosures
Copies of Commission regulations and Opinions are available in
many law libraries.
Alternatively, copies of these materials and
Commission advice letters may be obtained from the Commission at a
cost of
1Oc per page.

sections.conclusion: It does not appear that you have been authorized by the City of Burbank to seek our advice. Accordingly, we decline to provide advice on the issues you raised in your letter.
sections.question_synthetic: Whether the City of Burbank has certain duties under the Political Reform Act, as inquired about by a third party (Diane D. Adams).
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC declines to provide advice because the requester (Ms. Adams) does not appear to be authorized by the City of Burbank, as the Commission only provides advice to persons whose duties are in question or their authorized representatives, not to third parties.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Declination letter with clear conclusion section explaining grounds for declining. No verbatim QUESTION section present in document. Document includes regulatory references and enclosures.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: Whether the City of Burbank has certain duties under the Political Reform Act, as inquired about by a third party (Diane D. Adams).

CONCLUSION: It does not appear that you have been authorized by the City of Burbank to seek our advice. Accordingly, we decline to provide advice on the issues you raised in your letter.

embedding.summary: The FPPC declines to provide advice to Diane D. Adams regarding the City of Burbank's duties under the Political Reform Act because she lacks authorization from the City to seek such advice. The Commission clarifies it only advises those directly subject to the Act or their authorized representatives, not third parties.
